case_title: SWAIN, CONNIE VS GOLDSTINE, SIMONE et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWAIN, CONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDSTINE, SIMONE MILLER, ANDREW J. TRUSTEE OF THE RUTH F.
